title: AuditLogEntry
description: A single immutable, Ed25519-signed, SHA-256 tamper-evidence chained audit log entry. Authority: C27 §5. Related: Issue #768.

entry_id.description: UUID v4 for this log entry.

actor.description: The principal who triggered this event (steward ID, GAIAN ID, system process name).

payload.description: Structured event data. Privacy-filtered before storage per C27 §5 privacy principle.

previous_entry_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the previous entry in this GAIAN's audit log. null for genesis entry.

entry_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of this entry's canonical JSON (computed with entry_hash and signature fields empty).

signature.description: Base64-encoded Ed25519 signature over entry_hash, produced by GAIASecretVault.

privacy_redacted_fields.description: List of payload fields that were redacted for privacy. Preserves auditability without exposing personal data.

sovereignty_scope.description: Jurisdiction/sovereignty tag if applicable. Relevant for cross-border data operations.

AuditEventType.description: 16 audit event categories covering all C27 §5 event classes.

examples.action: Initiated ACTIVE→DORMANT transition for scheduled maintenance
